name: claude-mind-manager
description: Region-based context management for Claude Code. 5 commands: /mind-claudemd (create/audit/optimize CLAUDE.md), /mind-memory (MEMORY.md management), /mind-rules (rules validation/creation), /mind-files (project setup per type), /mind-update (fast context sweep). v3.1: intelligent multi-label project detection (code_app/workspace/scripts/data/config/plugin/mcp + secondary labels), 13 templates, supports C++/C#/Swift/Kotlin + non-code projects. 2 agents, 1 hook. Zero dependencies.
